goal: Make markdownlint the single source of truth for docs linting, remove redundant prettier-on-markdown, drive markdownlint to green across all docs, and enforce it in CI.

phases.goal: De-duplicate the markdown toolchain: prettier no longer touches markdown; markdownlint becomes sole docs authority. Zero doc content changes.
definition_of_done: no prettier-on-markdown script remains in package.json
no docs/**/*.md content reformatted in this phase

phases.goal: Drive markdownlint to green across ALL markdown including docs/.archives — autofix + hand-fix real content bugs (MD056/MD011/MD033/MD038).
definition_of_done: MD056 tables in ddd/domain-events.md + value-objects.md have correct column counts

phases.goal: Enforce docs + frontend formatting in CI so it can't regress.
definition_of_done: lint:md / markdownlint run step exists in ci.yml
new docs-lint job listed under ci-success needs
continue-on-error:true removed from the src prettier step

summary: de-dup markdown toolchain: removed prettier-on-md (package.json format/format:check + Makefile format-docs/format-check-docs), added **/*.md to .prettierignore. markdownlint sole docs authority. Config-only, 0 docs reformatted. Frontend types prettier advisory left for phase 2.

markdownlint green across 243 md files incl archives. Autofix MD009/MD012/MD004; hand-fix MD056 tables (value-objects commas, domain-events escaped pipes), MD033 archive backtick. Disabled MD011 (false-positives + --fix corrupts valid stacked citation links; restored mangled links).
